steps.title: Split hub file: node:path.py
steps.description: `node:path` has 180 incoming connections. Split into 63 focused modules to reduce coupling.
steps.rationale: High fan-in (180 files depend on this) creates a bottleneck. Changes to this file ripple to 180 other files. Splitting by usage pattern reduces blast radius.
